Google Ads is an online advertising platform that developes by Google.

Google Advertising Products is an advertising service provided by Google Ireland Ltd that allows the Owner to manage and plan advertising campaigns. This includes designing the ads, displaying them to the right targeted audience, bidding through automated decision-making tools (called "automated bidding") and measuring the campaign's performance. Users may decide to disable the ad personalization Trackers by going to: Google Ad Settings. In order to understand Google's use of Data, consult [Google's partner policy](https://policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sites).

Google Analytics is a web analysis service provided by Google Ireland Ltd (“Google”). Google utilizes the Data collected to track and examine the use of this website/app, to prepare reports on its activities and share them with other Google services.  \r\nGoogle may use the Data collected to contextualize and personalize the ads of its own advertising network.
